response.overview: Nur Julia Arina is an ordinary girl. She yearns for love from a wealthy man. Her situation becomes chaotic when her own sister, who is married to an engineer, frequently insults her for not having a stable job and not having a boyfriend. Because of this, the flame of love that began to grow for the widower next door is cast far away. The city of Kuala Lumpur witnesses the reunion of Julia Arina and Mr. Dud Pokai whom she had avoided. The true identity of this man is now revealed. Mr. Dud Pokai is Adam Zafran Tan Sri Daniel Iskandar. Oops, how embarrassing for Julia. As romantic as it is, this man's love remains pure for Julia. Happiness does not come rolling without trials. A love triangle between Adam Zafran, Adam Haykal and Nur Julia Arina causes all three to suffer. How could Adam Haykal admit defeat to the brother he despises? And Julia, can she withstand the jealousy and envy of her own sister?
response.title: Julia Arina
